raw.message: Book your stay with us and improve your experience with exclusive hospitality 🤘

hook.summary: Aspirational montage of a luxury hotel and casino experience.
hook.visual_action: Zooming shot of the guitar-shaped Hard Rock Hotel followed by a luxury suite reveal.

scene_flow: Exterior zoom of the iconic guitar-shaped hotel building.
Quick cut to a pristine, luxury hotel room interior.
POV shot of tropical cocktails being toasted by a resort pool.
Wide shot of a modern, high-tech casino floor with roulette.
Final shots of indoor and outdoor luxury pool facilities.
audience_proxy: Young adults and travelers seeking luxury lifestyle experiences and high-end entertainment.
